chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 305 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on Misc. No.1512/2025 3. For orders on Misc. No.1513/2025 4. For hearing of main case 26.02.2025 Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for the petitioner Per learned counsel, remedy pursuant to the SPPRA Rules has already been availed upto the stage of review, therefore, no case is made out to entertain this petition. This court does not sit in appeal for orders rendered under the SPPRA rules. Absence of subsequent forum of appeal is no grounds for preferring this petition in writ jurisdiction. This plea is also misconceived in view of the judgment of the Supreme Court passed in Gul Taiz Khan Marwat vs. The Registrar, Peshawar High Court, Peshawar (PLD 2021 SC 391). In view hereof no case is made out, hence, this petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
